penalties.description: Task incomplete - not all 6 objects were successfully transferred back to the original side within the time limit.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on timing (236 seconds) and that the task was incomplete. Claude correctly applied the automatic zero rule for incomplete tasks, while GPT-4o incorrectly calculated the penalty deduction. The official rubric states incomplete tasks receive automatic zero scores.

disagreements.rationale: For incomplete tasks in FLS Peg Transfer, the rubric requires an automatic zero score. Claude correctly applied this rule while GPT-4o failed to apply the penalty deduction despite identifying the incomplete task.
Incomplete tasks automatically receive zero points according to FLS scoring rules. GPT-4o's calculation of 64.0 violates this fundamental rule.
